text: Hi Dana, so sorry for the late notice but I woke up with a fever and won't be able to watch the kids tomorrow. I was scheduled to watch Quinn on Tuesday July 7th 2026 from 9am to 5pm. Hopefully back Wednesday. - Avery

expected.description: Nanny Avery is sick and cannot watch Quinn

text: ALERT from Green Valley Soccer: Junior Striker Soccer Camp is CANCELLED for Wednesday, July 8, 2026 due to a facilities issue. This affects Pat's 9:00 AM - 12:00 PM session. All other sessions this week run as scheduled.

expected.description: Junior Striker Soccer Camp cancelled due to a facilities issue

text: Astro Academy notice: Sam's robotics session on Thursday, July 16, 2026 will start two hours late at 11:00 AM due to staff training. Pick-up remains at 3:00 PM.
